actions.name: create_webhook

formId.description: The public identifier of the form to subscribe to.

url.description: The endpoint that receives submission events.

actions.risk: registers a new outbound webhook subscription that will POST live form-submission data to an external URL; external mutation, approval required

actions.name: remove_webhook

webhookId.description: The id returned when the webhook was created.

actions.risk: permanently removes a webhook subscription; event delivery to its target URL stops immediately

actions.name: delete_submission_by_id
actions.risk: permanently deletes a single form response; irreversible, approval required
